{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/269803746?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Proscan-one", "id": 269803746, "login": "Proscan-one", "node_id": "U_kgDOEBTg4g", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Proscan-one", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47379", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-203", "name": "Observable Discrepancy"}], "description": "### Summary
The shared-view password check fell back to strict-equality (`===`) comparison for
legacy plaintext passwords, leaking the password's length and per-character prefix
through response timing.

### Details
The bcrypt branch (hashes starting with `$2a$`/`$2b$`) was unaffected. The legacy
fallback in `View.ts` now uses `crypto.timingSafeEqual` and a same-length dummy
compare on the length-mismatch path, so total comparison time is approximately
length-independent. The EE dashboard model's `verifyPassword` is patched the same way.

### Impact
A network-positioned attacker could mount a timing oracle against shared views whose
passwords predated the bcrypt migration. Exploitation requires the ability to time
shared-view authentication responses but no prior authentication.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@Proscan-one](https://github.com/Proscan-one).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00253, "percentile": 0.16568}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qhxg-623c-cfjm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:03:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qhxg-623c-cfjm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qhxg-623c-cfjm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47379"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:03:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-qhxg-623c-cfjm", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qhxg-623c-cfjm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-qhxg-623c-cfjm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Plaintext Password Comparison in Shared Views", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:03:35Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qhxg-623c-cfjm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: NocoDB: Plaintext Password Comparison in Shared Views
